title: Official Website of Board of Apprenticeship Training(NR),Kanpur
text_content: Official Website of Board of Apprenticeship Training(NR),Kanpur Continuation of the existing Central Government Share of Stipend for Apprentices under Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) Click Here Circular for Submission of documents for receiving payment of Govt. share of Stipend to Apprentices through DBT with annexures Click Here Register for event at www.govtevent.com HAR GHAR TIRANGA Meeting with Stakeholders Industry Meet NATS Training Workshop Industry Visit Industry Institute Interaction Previous Next BoAT(NR) News Submission of claim for reimbursement of Govt. share of stipend "Extension of NATS to Graduates (Bachelor) of general streams" "Notice to ALERT Applicants regarding spurious information" Revised Stipend rate and extension of NATS to Graduate of general streams Hon. Shri Dharmendra Pradhan Hon'ble Minister of Education, Government of India The apprenticeship training is one of the sources to develop skilled manpower for industry, by using training facilities available in the establishments without putting extra burden on exchequer to setup training infrastructure. Chairman's Message Prof. Abhay Karandikar Hon'ble Chairman BoAT(NR), Ministry of Education, Government of India I would like to express my deep sense of gratitude to all the stake holders for their support in implementing the National Apprenticeship Training Scheme and wish that the establishments, institutions, students/aspirants and BoAT(NR) will create synergies like never before and contribute in overcoming the skilled manpower shortage of the country and the world. Read more...

h3: Hon'ble Minister of Education, Government of India

Hon'ble Chairman BoAT(NR), Ministry of Education,
                                            Government of India
